title: DevHarness Review Dispatch Output
description: Output contract that dispatches review branches selected by the approved planning contract.

outcome.description: Machine-readable stage outcome used by workflow routing.
outcome.x-usage: Downstream next/match logic reads this value; choose only the enum/const value that matches the stage state.

summary.description: Concise human-readable summary for this contract section.

selected_review_steps.description: Concrete review branch step ids selected by the planning contract.
selected_review_steps.x-usage: Runtime dispatch reads these step ids as the review fan-out target.

verdict.description: Structured decision payload for this gate.
verdict.x-usage: Downstream prompts use this as the authoritative critique/review result.

artifacts.description: Optional structured artifacts emitted by this stage.
artifacts.x-usage: Use for named files or durable handoff artifacts the orchestrator should preserve.

results.description: Optional structured result summaries emitted by this stage.
results.x-usage: Use for compact machine-readable evidence or decisions that should remain in baton state.
